name: fist-arm-alignment-qc
description: QC fist visual scale, hand alignment, weld attachment, and capture a player-view frame.

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Coins=1000000,Power=1000,WallLevel=99}) c:Invoke('BuyFist','Boxing Glove') return 'ready'

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character local h=c and (c:FindFirstChild('RightHand') or c:FindFirstChild('Right Arm')) local g=c and c:FindFirstChild('Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet') local v=g and g:FindFirstChild('Creator Store Fist Visual',true) local anchored=0 local welds=0 local maxDistance=0 if g then for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('BasePart') then if d.Anchored then anchored+=1 end if h then maxDistance=math.max(maxDistance,(d.Position-h.Position).Magnitude) end elseif d:IsA('WeldConstraint') then welds+=1 end end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=v~=nil,anchored=anchored,welds=welds,maxDistance=maxDistance,style=g and g:GetAttribute('FistStyle')})

local c=game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character local h=c and (c:FindFirstChild('RightHand') or c:FindFirstChild('Right Arm')) local g=c and c:FindFirstChild('Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet') local v=g and g:FindFirstChild('Creator Store Fist Visual',true) local anchored=0 local welds=0 local maxDistance=0 if g then for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('BasePart') then if d.Anchored then anchored+=1 end if h then maxDistance=math.max(maxDistance,(d.Position-h.Position).Magnitude) end elseif d:IsA('WeldConstraint') then welds+=1 end end end return tostring(v~=nil and anchored==0 and welds>0 and maxDistance<2.4)
